name: Pineapple

pros.title: usually beats ultra-processed sweet snacks
pros.explanation: That replacement value matters in real life.

pros.title: easy to use as a whole food
pros.explanation: Simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating.

pros.title: ingredient simplicity is hard to argue with
pros.explanation: Whole-fruit clarity is part of the category appeal.

cons.title: can be easy to waste if timing is off
cons.explanation: Perishability is a practical downside people actually feel.

cons.title: easy to eat quickly when it is very sweet
cons.explanation: That can blur the line between light and sugar-heavy portions.

cons.title: sugar can climb fast
cons.explanation: A lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
